mapper.sql: id, role_name, role_code, role_desc, role_type, status, sort, data_scope, role_level, is_system, is_deletable, is_editable, role_icon, role_color, ext_data, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted, remark
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM sys_role WHERE role_name = #{roleName} AND deleted = 0

SELECT r.id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.role_desc, r.role_type, r.status, r.sort, r.data_scope, r.role_level, r.is_system, r.role_icon, r.role_color FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 ORDER BY r.sort ASC

SELECT r.id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.role_desc, r.role_type, r.status, r.sort FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON r.id = rm.role_id WHERE rm.menu_id = #{menuId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 ORDER BY r.sort ASC

SELECT r.id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.role_desc, r.role_type, r.status, r.sort FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_role_dept rd ON r.id = rd.role_id WHERE rd.dept_id = #{deptId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 ORDER BY r.sort ASC

SELECT
FROM sys_role WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM sys_role WHERE deleted = 0 AND is_system = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM sys_role WHERE deleted = 0 AND role_type = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalRoles, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as enabledRoles, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as disabledRoles, SUM(CASE WHEN role_type = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as systemRoles, SUM(CASE WHEN role_type = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as businessRoles, SUM(CASE WHEN is_system = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as builtinRoles, SUM(CASE WHEN is_system = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as customRoles FROM sys_role WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT r.role_name, COUNT(ur.user_id) as userCount FROM sys_role r LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 GROUP BY r.id, r.role_name ORDER BY userCount DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_role SET sort = #{sort}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND deleted = 0
AND id != #{excludeId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role WHERE role_name = #{roleName} AND deleted = 0
AND id != #{excludeId}
